name: firewall_acl
promptSpec:
Process firewall_acl(src_trust, dst_port, proto) -> (action, log)

FSF specification:
if (src_trust lt 0) => action eq 0 && log eq 1
if (src_trust eq 0 && dst_port eq 22) => action eq 0 && log eq 1
if (src_trust ge 8 && dst_port eq 22) => action eq 1 && log eq 0
if (src_trust ge 5 && dst_port le 1024) => action eq 1 && log eq 1
if (src_trust ge 3 && dst_port gt 1024) => action eq 1 && log eq 0
others => action eq 0 && log eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Firewall ACL first-match (deny/allow with port preemption)

name: role_gated_transfer
promptSpec:
Process role_gated_transfer(role, amount, paused) -> (ok, reason)

FSF specification:
if (paused eq 1) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 1
if (role eq 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 2
if (role ge 3 && amount ge 50) => ok eq 1 && reason eq 0
if (role ge 2 && amount ge 20) => ok eq 1 && reason eq 0
if (role ge 1 && amount le 10) => ok eq 1 && reason eq 0
others => ok eq 0 && reason eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Solidity-style Ownable/role transfer gate (ordered privileges)

name: compute_tax
promptSpec:
Process compute_tax(income, is_foreign) -> (bracket)

FSF specification:
if (income lt 0) => bracket eq 0
if (income ge 80 && is_foreign eq 1) => bracket eq 3
if (income ge 50) => bracket eq 2
if (income ge 20) => bracket eq 1
others => bracket eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Running-example tax brackets (foreign-high preempts mid)

name: bill_subscription
promptSpec:
Process bill_subscription(usage, plan, overdue) -> (charge, throttle)

FSF specification:
if (overdue eq 1) => charge eq 0 && throttle eq 1
if (plan ge 3 && usage ge 80) => charge eq 15 && throttle eq 0
if (plan ge 2 && usage ge 40) => charge eq 8 && throttle eq 0
if (plan ge 1 && usage ge 10) => charge eq 3 && throttle eq 0
others => charge eq 0 && throttle eq 0

externalProvenance.section: SaaS billing tiers with overdue preemption (open-source billing pattern)

name: split_royalty
promptSpec:
Process split_royalty(price, creator_share, platform) -> (creator_pay, plat_pay)

FSF specification:
if (price le 0) => creator_pay eq 0 && plat_pay eq 0
if (platform eq 1 && creator_share ge 15) => creator_pay eq 15 && plat_pay eq 5
if (creator_share ge 10) => creator_pay eq 10 && plat_pay eq 2
if (creator_share ge 5) => creator_pay eq 5 && plat_pay eq 1
others => creator_pay eq 0 && plat_pay eq 0

externalProvenance.section: NFT royalty split with platform surcharge preemption

name: route_packet
promptSpec:
Process route_packet(priority, congest, acl_deny) -> (fwd, queue)

FSF specification:
if (acl_deny eq 1) => fwd eq 0 && queue eq 0
if (priority ge 9 && congest ge 5) => fwd eq 1 && queue eq 0
if (priority ge 5 && congest ge 7) => fwd eq 1 && queue eq 1
if (priority ge 2) => fwd eq 1 && queue eq 2
others => fwd eq 0 && queue eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Packet routing QoS with ACL deny first

name: underwrite_loan

fsfScenarios.test: credit_band ge 8 && income_k ge 8 && dti le 3

promptSpec:
Process underwrite_loan(credit_band, income_k, dti) -> (decision, limit_k)

FSF specification:
if (credit_band lt 3) => decision eq 0 && limit_k eq 0
if (credit_band ge 8 && income_k ge 8 && dti le 3) => decision eq 1 && limit_k eq 15
if (credit_band ge 6 && income_k ge 5) => decision eq 1 && limit_k eq 8
if (credit_band ge 3 && dti le 5) => decision eq 2 && limit_k eq 3
others => decision eq 0 && limit_k eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Retail loan underwriting decision table (ordered risk bands)

name: gate_wire_transfer
promptSpec:
Process gate_wire_transfer(amount, dest_risk, auth_level) -> (allow, hold)

FSF specification:
if (dest_risk ge 4) => allow eq 0 && hold eq 1
if (amount ge 15 && auth_level lt 3) => allow eq 0 && hold eq 1
if (amount ge 8 && auth_level ge 2) => allow eq 1 && hold eq 1
if (amount lt 8 && auth_level ge 1) => allow eq 1 && hold eq 0
others => allow eq 0 && hold eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Wire transfer compliance gate with overlapping amount/auth bands

name: route_call
promptSpec:
Process route_call(qos, trunk_load, vip) -> (route, preempt)

FSF specification:
if (vip eq 1 && qos ge 2) => route eq 1 && preempt eq 1
if (trunk_load ge 9) => route eq 0 && preempt eq 0
if (qos ge 4 && trunk_load le 6) => route eq 2 && preempt eq 0
if (qos ge 2) => route eq 3 && preempt eq 0
others => route eq 0 && preempt eq 0

externalProvenance.section: RF pattern: telecom call routing / overload policy

name: throttle_sms
promptSpec:
Process throttle_sms(rate, spam_score, enterprise) -> (deliver, delay_s)

FSF specification:
if (spam_score ge 8) => deliver eq 0 && delay_s eq 0
if (enterprise eq 1 && rate le 15) => deliver eq 1 && delay_s eq 0
if (rate gt 12 && spam_score ge 4) => deliver eq 0 && delay_s eq 0
if (rate gt 8) => deliver eq 1 && delay_s eq 5
others => deliver eq 0 && delay_s eq 0

externalProvenance.section: SMS gateway rate / spam throttle (first-match)

name: check_badge_access

fsfScenarios.test: clearance ge 1 && zone eq 1 && time_ok eq 1

promptSpec:
Process check_badge_access(clearance, zone, time_ok) -> (open, alarm)

FSF specification:
if (time_ok eq 0 && zone ge 2) => open eq 0 && alarm eq 1
if (clearance ge 4 && zone le 4) => open eq 1 && alarm eq 0
if (clearance ge 2 && zone le 2) => open eq 1 && alarm eq 0
if (clearance ge 1 && zone eq 1 && time_ok eq 1) => open eq 1 && alarm eq 0
others => open eq 0 && alarm eq 0

externalProvenance.section: RF pattern: physical / logical authorization

name: enforce_api_acl
promptSpec:
Process enforce_api_acl(role, scope, mfa) -> (permit, step_up)

FSF specification:
if (role eq 0) => permit eq 0 && step_up eq 0
if (scope ge 3 && mfa eq 0) => permit eq 0 && step_up eq 1
if (role ge 3 && scope le 3) => permit eq 1 && step_up eq 0
if (role ge 1 && scope le 1) => permit eq 1 && step_up eq 0
others => permit eq 0 && step_up eq 0

externalProvenance.section: API ACL with MFA step-up on sensitive scopes

name: dose_alert
promptSpec:
Process dose_alert(weight_kg, age, severity) -> (dose_u, alert)

FSF specification:
if (severity ge 4 && age lt 5) => dose_u eq 0 && alert eq 3
if (age lt 5 && weight_kg lt 8) => dose_u eq 1 && alert eq 2
if (age ge 12 && severity ge 3) => dose_u eq 4 && alert eq 1
if (weight_kg ge 10 && severity ge 1) => dose_u eq 2 && alert eq 0
others => dose_u eq 0 && alert eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Pediatric / adult dosage alert decision table (scaled kg/age)

name: prioritize_pick
promptSpec:
Process prioritize_pick(sla_h, qty, hazmat) -> (wave, special)

FSF specification:
if (hazmat eq 1) => wave eq 0 && special eq 1
if (sla_h le 2 && qty ge 5) => wave eq 1 && special eq 0
if (sla_h le 4) => wave eq 2 && special eq 0
if (qty ge 10) => wave eq 3 && special eq 0
others => wave eq 0 && special eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Warehouse pick-wave prioritization (SLA vs hazmat)

name: apply_fare_rule
promptSpec:
Process apply_fare_rule(advance_d, flex, intl) -> (fare_band, change_fee)

FSF specification:
if (intl eq 1 && advance_d lt 3) => fare_band eq 4 && change_fee eq 3
if (advance_d ge 14 && flex eq 0) => fare_band eq 1 && change_fee eq 2
if (flex eq 1) => fare_band eq 3 && change_fee eq 0
if (advance_d ge 7) => fare_band eq 2 && change_fee eq 1
others => fare_band eq 0 && change_fee eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Fare family / change-fee rules with overlapping advance-purchase

name: triage_claim
promptSpec:
Process triage_claim(amount, fraud_score, injury) -> (queue, siu)

FSF specification:
if (fraud_score ge 7) => queue eq 0 && siu eq 1
if (injury eq 1 && amount ge 8) => queue eq 1 && siu eq 0
if (amount ge 10) => queue eq 2 && siu eq 0
if (amount ge 3) => queue eq 3 && siu eq 0
others => queue eq 0 && siu eq 0

externalProvenance.section: RF pattern: boundary screening applied to claims triage

name: boiler_interlock
promptSpec:
Process boiler_interlock(pressure, flame, water_ok) -> (fuel, lockout)

FSF specification:
if (water_ok eq 0) => fuel eq 0 && lockout eq 1
if (pressure ge 14) => fuel eq 0 && lockout eq 1
if (flame eq 0 && pressure ge 5) => fuel eq 0 && lockout eq 0
if (flame eq 1 && pressure le 12) => fuel eq 1 && lockout eq 0
others => fuel eq 0 && lockout eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Boiler fuel interlock (safety-first ordered guards)

name: limit_api_rate
promptSpec:
Process limit_api_rate(rps, burst, plan) -> (allow, retry_after)

FSF specification:
if (plan ge 3) => allow eq 1 && retry_after eq 0
if (rps gt 15 && burst gt 8) => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 10
if (rps gt 10 && plan ge 2) => allow eq 1 && retry_after eq 2
if (rps gt 10) => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 5
others => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 0

externalProvenance.section: API gateway rate limit with plan override

name: screen_card_fraud
promptSpec:
Process screen_card_fraud(amount, velocity, geo_risk) -> (block, challenge)

FSF specification:
if (geo_risk ge 4) => block eq 1 && challenge eq 0
if (amount ge 12 && velocity ge 6) => block eq 1 && challenge eq 0
if (amount ge 6 && velocity ge 3) => block eq 0 && challenge eq 1
if (amount le 5) => block eq 0 && challenge eq 0
others => block eq 0 && challenge eq 0

externalProvenance.section: RF pattern: payment fraud boundary screening

name: compute_overtime
promptSpec:
Process compute_overtime(hours, night, holiday) -> (mult_x10, premium)

FSF specification:
if (holiday eq 1) => mult_x10 eq 20 && premium eq 1
if (night eq 1 && hours gt 8) => mult_x10 eq 15 && premium eq 1
if (hours gt 8) => mult_x10 eq 15 && premium eq 0
if (hours le 8 && night eq 1) => mult_x10 eq 12 && premium eq 1
others => mult_x10 eq 0 && premium eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Payroll overtime / night / holiday multipliers (x10 scale)

name: AddToCart
promptSpec:
Process AddToCart(customer, product) -> (ok, inventory, price_keys, inventory)

FSF specification:
if (customer gt 0) => ok eq 1
if (product eq 0) => ok eq 0
others => ok eq 0

name: Checkout
promptSpec:
Process Checkout(customer, total) -> (receipt, inventory, price_keys, inventory)

FSF specification:
if (total eq 0) => receipt eq 0
others => receipt eq 0

name: Refund
promptSpec:
Process Refund(order, amount) -> (cleared)

FSF specification:
if (order gt 0) => cleared eq 1
if (order eq 0) => cleared eq 0
others => cleared eq 0

name: Authorize
promptSpec:
Process Authorize(customer, amount) -> (ok)

FSF specification:
if (amount gt 0) => ok eq 1
if (amount eq 0) => ok eq 0
others => ok eq 0

name: Capture
promptSpec:
Process Capture(order) -> (ok, pending_total)

FSF specification:
if (order gt 0) => ok eq 1
others => ok eq 0

name: CollectFee
promptSpec:
Process CollectFee(patient, amount, insurance_cap) -> (ok, collected)

FSF specification:
if (amount gt 0) => ok eq 1
if (amount gt insurance_cap) => ok eq 0
others => ok eq 0

name: RefundFee
promptSpec:
Process RefundFee(amount) -> (ok)

FSF specification:
if (amount gt 0) => ok eq 1
others => ok eq 0

name: AdmitUrgent
promptSpec:
Process AdmitUrgent(patient, severity) -> (admitted, queue, open_beds)

FSF specification:
if (severity gt 0) => admitted eq 1
others => admitted eq 0

name: manualseed_telecomseverity
promptSpec:
Process ManualSeed_TelecomSeverity(link_down, latency, packet_loss) -> (severity)

FSF specification:
if (link_down eq 1) => severity eq 3
if (packet_loss ge 5) => severity eq 2
if (latency gt 8) => severity eq 1
others => severity eq 0

name: current_authorization

fsfScenarios.test: acct_ok gt 0 && pin_ok gt 0 && tries lt 3 && locked eq 0

promptSpec:
Process current_authorization(acct_ok, pin_ok, tries, locked) -> (permit, msg)

FSF specification:
if (locked gt 0) => permit eq 0 && msg eq 4
if (acct_ok eq 0) => permit eq 0 && msg eq 3
if (tries ge 3) => permit eq 0 && msg eq 4
if (pin_ok eq 0) => permit eq 0 && msg eq 2
if (acct_ok gt 0 && pin_ok gt 0 && tries lt 3 && locked eq 0) => permit eq 1 && msg eq 0
others => permit eq 0 && msg eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Current_Authorization: account/PIN/tries/lock precedence
